Caption: A comprehensive procedure for the design and manufacture of a battery module.
(a) Dismantling and disassembly process for battery modules; (b) battery–testing system used for conducting charging–discharging tests.
Experimental setup for the verification of the produced battery modules.

Temperature variation of the battery modules at six different positions in a charging–discharging cycle from four categories: (a) Category 1 (manufacturer); (b) Category 2 (manufacturer); (c) Category 3 (SVC-clustered battery module); (d) Category 4 (k-means-clustered battery module).
